<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by vue-docgen-cli — do not edit. Source: src/components/CnWikiTreeNode/CnWikiTreeNode.vue -->

### Props

| Name         | Type     | Required | Default      | Description                                                                                                                |
| ------------ | -------- | -------- | ------------ | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `node`       | `object` | ✓        | —            | The tree node this row represents. Read via `node[titleField]` for the label and `node[treeField]` for the children array. |
| `titleField` | `string` |          | `'title'`    | Property holding the node label.                                                                                           |
| `treeField`  | `string` |          | `'children'` | Property holding the children array.                                                                                       |

### Events

| Name    | Payload | Description                                                                                                                                                |
| ------- | ------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `click` | —       | Emitted with the leaf node (NOT the chain of ancestors) whenever any node in the subtree is clicked. The parent CnWikiPage re-emits this as `@tree-click`. |
